prompt: An original dark-fantasy support unit called Throne Echo: a ghostly translucent echo-priest figure wearing faded regal remnants of tattered royal cloth, wielding a tall staff topped with a small floating fragment of a broken throne, cel-shaded 2.5D anime/game production art, painterly textures, high readability, full-body, three-quarter hero framing, clear staff/prop silhouette, calm supportive floating pose, soft protective pale-gold and faint spectral-white rim lighting, isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF magenta background, no shadow outside the base, no text, no logos, no watermark, no copyrighted character likeness, original design only.
